message: I do not touch the dead-drop yet. I step just far enough into the accessway to break line of sight from the taxi mirror, then study the panel, replaced dust, locking bolt, wall seams, floor, and ceiling above it. I am looking for traps, hidden transmitters, fresh heat, a secondary watcher, or signs that the panel was staged to lure investigators in.
